full_text:
Cen Shu (Yuanjian) 岑述 (元儉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cen Shu (岑述), styledYuanjian (元儉). Li Yan wished to kill him to cover his tracks, Zhang Yi disliked him but trusted by Zhuge Liang. Cen Shu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
